creator: swills@FreeBSD.org
text:
Hi,

I did have a log, but after reproducing I think the issue was actually 
somehow a local issue related to ccache and tinderbox (ccache was giving 
permission denied errors for some reason). So probably not worth marking 
it MAKE_JOBS_UNSAFE. Sorry for the false alarm. I'll try to remember to 
include logs in the future. Feel free to close the PR.

Thanks,
Steve
